title: Portkeys LH5P II 5.5" 2000nit Camera Field Monitor Metal Frame Camera Control for FX3/FX30/A7RIV/A7MIV/A6300/A6400/RX100/RX02/A7CII/ZV-E10, GH6/BS1H/BGH1, C70/200/300/700/R5/6/7/8, Z8/9, ZCAM E2, etc
features: 【5.5" 2000nit Camera Monitor】Portkeys LH5P II Camera Field Monitor 5.5" 2000nit Brightness touchscreen monitor with Metal Frame aluminum housing & Tempered Glass with 1920*1080 resolution

【Wired Control】Portkeys LH5P II can wired control for FS5/FS7/FX6/FX9/A9 II/A7M III/A7R III/A7S III/A7R IV/A7M IV/A6000/A6300/A6400/A6500/RX100/RX02/FX3/FX30/A1/A7CII/ZV-E10/ZV-1, S1/S5/G9/GH6/S1H/S1R/GH5 II(AF/MF)/S5/S5M2/S5M2X/BGH1/BS1H, C70/C700PL/C700/GSPL/C300 MARK II/C300 MARK II PL/C300 MARK III/C200/C200 B/C100/C100 MARK lI/EOS R/EOS R5 (TOUCH FOCUS)/EOS R6 (TOUCH FOCUS)/EOS R6 Mark II(TOUCH FOCUS)/1DX/1DX MARK II/5DS/5DS R/5D MARK IV/5D MARK III/5D MARK II/6D/6D MARK II/80D, Nucleus-N/Nucleus-M

【Wireless Control】Portkeys LH5P II can wireless control for EOS R5/R6/R6 Mark II/R7/R8, Z8/Z9, ZCAM E2, A1/A9 II/A7S III/A7CII/FX3/FX30/ZV-1/ZV-E1/ZV-E10/RX10/A7M IV/A7R IV/A7R V/RX0/A7M III, BLACKMAGIC URSA MINI 4K/MINI 4.6K/MINI PRO 4.6K G2/BROADCAST/CINEMA CAMERA 2.7K/CINEMA CAMERA 4K/MICRO STUDIO CAMERA 4K, BGH1/BS1H

【Collaborative Control】With a single Portkeys monitor equipped with wireless control compatibility, you can simultaneously control up to four Portkeys monitors (built-in wireless camera control function)within 50m. This enables parameter adjustment and touch focus control across different camera brands and models. Stable connection and fast response

【Advanced Features】Anamorphic, 3D LUT, Zebra, Waveform, Check Field, Grids, Audio Meters, Image Flip, Color Temperature, Peaking, Zooming, Cross Hair, Camera Control, Display Flip, False Color, X-Rite Color Calibration System, Power to Camera by Dummy Battery (Note: Battery is not included)
【Freeze Frame】Capture any frame and compare it with live video on a USB stick with a semi-transparent image overlay

【IMPORTANT】The manual is in the USB flash drive. LH5P II can control various camera models with touch screen, we provide LANC and USB-C control cables, if your camera is not these two control interfaces, please purchase the control cable separately
description: Product Description The Portkeys LH5P II is our 5.5-inch on-camera entry-level model into the world of wired and wireless camera control. It has a maximum brightness of 2,000 nits, so shooting outside in full sunlight is easy. Previous page Next page Professional Software Features: 3D LUT, waveform, new peaking, histogram, guides, zebra, control field, grids, audiometers, hue, touch capabilities, backlight, adjustable fan, zoom, mirror image, OSD mirroring, reticle, camera control, false color, anamorph, etc. Support multiple camera controls Previous page Next page
